title: Ellipse
description:
Ellipse: A plane curve. A standard ellipse defining a curve of constant combined distance around two foci.
The larger of the two radii defines the major axis of the Ellipse, and the line along which the two foci lie.

Radius1.description: Distance from the Centre to a point on the Ellipse along Axis1. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Radius2.description: Distance from the Centre to a point on the Ellipse along Axis2. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

_t.description: Optional Type descriminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
